ddt:Target.Name: USA_Bosch_Gen6_XFK_X82ph2_V7_HLL
ddt:Target.Description:
SONAR/USA Gen6 Bosch XFK/X82²
Ivan JANIN SONAR PDE & LIS UPA/FKP, HFP, BSW, UTA
Tel. : +33140107255 ivan.janin@fr.bosch.com

Item.Text: LED is light when UPA is OFF
LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

Data.Name: gcfg3.DDD_DevCANFrameActivatedLastPowerCycle
Data.Comment: Used by DDD SWC to keep devIds active if devIds active in last power cycle.

Item.Text: UTA CAN Dev Ids disabled (Off) on last cycle
UTA CAN Dev Ids enabled (On) on last cycle

Data.Name: cfg.APA_Threshold.SpeedThresholdForExitingStartOfMission
Data.Comment: [REQ_S_APA_USA_0307]a and APA Statechart and UPA and USA_CMF1_Diagnosis

Item.Text: LEDs are OFF under/over speed thresholds
LEDs are ON under/over speed thresholds

Data.Name: cfg.DiagAddonEnable
Data.Comment: See Future Diag Addon Spec & CMF1²_Diagnosis

Data.Name: cfg.DDD_SWversionNumber
Data.Comment: Data containing version of DDD Library Build.

Item.Text: the button has not been pushed yet
the button was pushed at least one time
7 - Error message - PO slot too small
Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC
2 - ErrMsg - PSM unavailable Speed too High
3 - ErrMsg - Park measure unavailable in Rear Gear
4.1 - ErrMsg - Reduce speed under 30km/h for PSM

Data.Name: OperationalReference
Data.Comment: Renault SW Ref + Config Ref PDX file

Data.Name: cfg.CAN_CLKCRC_DTC
Data.Comment: Dev Value to enable/Disable DTC rise on CLK & CRC CAN failures

Item.Text: No CLK and No CRC DTC Rise
Rise CLK DTC and Rise CRC DTC

Data.Name: cfg.CheckHMIDisplay.Level
Data.Comment: Select obstacle level detection cf CMF1²_Diagnosis

Data.Name: cfg.CheckHMIDisplay.Zone
Data.Comment: Enable/Disable HMI CAN Request cf USA_CMF1²_Diagnosis

Item.Text: FKP Front Side Left Only (all zones)
FKP Front Side Right Only (all zones)
FKP Rear Side Left Only (all zones)
FKP Rear Side Right Only (all zones)

Data.Name: cfg.CheckSoundDisplay.Channel
Data.Comment: Enable/Disable Sound CAN Request cf CMF1²_Diag

Data.Name: cfg.CheckSoundDisplay.Volume
Data.Comment: Select ParkAssist Volume Level cf CMF1²_Diag

Item.Text: Slope From Internal and MinWheelTorque OFF
Slope From Internal and MinWheelTorque ON
Slope from CAN and MinWheelTorque OFF
Slope from CAN and MinWheelTorque ON

Data.Name: cfg.APA_SafetyDistance.CRC
Data.Comment: "SAE J1850 CRC-8bits See CRC_Safety_DID file for delivery value automatic calculation --> Delivery V

Data.Name: cfg.APA_SafetyCalib.CRC
Data.Comment: "SAE J1850 CRC-8bits See CRC_Safety_DID file for delivery value automatic calculation --> Delivery V

Data.Name: cfg.RawSensorTh.CRC
Data.Comment: "SAE J1850 CRC-8bits See CRC_Safety_DID file for delivery value automatic calculation --> Delivery V

Data.Name: cfg.SafetyBag.CRC
Data.Comment: "SAE J1850 CRC-8bits See CRC_Safety_DID file for delivery value automatic calculation --> Delivery V

Data.Name: cfg.SensorsTypes.Sensors_1_6
Data.Comment: Sensor type configuration (6.0, 6.1 or 6.5) - Front side sensors

Data.Name: cfg.SensorsTypes.Sensors_2_5
Data.Comment: Sensor type configuration (6.0, 6.1 or 6.5) - Front outer sensors

Data.Name: cfg.SensorsTypes.Sensors_3_4
Data.Comment: Sensor type configuration (6.0, 6.1 or 6.5) - Front inner sensors

Data.Name: cfg.SensorsTypes.Sensors_7_12
Data.Comment: Sensor type configuration (6.0, 6.1 or 6.5) - Rear side sensors

Data.Name: cfg.SensorsTypes.Sensors_8_11
Data.Comment: Sensor type configuration (6.0, 6.1 or 6.5) - Rear outer sensors

Data.Name: cfg.SensorsTypes.Sensors_9_10
Data.Comment: Sensor type configuration (6.0, 6.1 or 6.5) - Rear inner sensors

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList
Data.Comment: List of Data Identifiers for Input Output Control - The list defined here is AN EXAMPLE.
Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level OutOfRange/0 adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed / blocked

Data.Name: PSM_SwitchLEDCommand
Data.Comment: "PWM Value to active Switch LED CMF1²_Diagnosis"

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: APA_UPAFKP_PSM_SwitchLEDCommand
Data.Comment: PWM Value to active Switch LED

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: applicationDataIdentification
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Test.Description: Component internal failure (Sensor ASIC / Sensor Micro)
Sensor ringing time too short - HW defect in sensor (Membrane, piezo oscillator)
Sensor Blocked by Ice or Mud.
Persistent noise disturbance in the ultrasonic range
Component internal failure (Sensor ASIC / Sensor Micro)
Sensor ringing time too short - HW defect in sensor (Membrane, piezo oscillator)
Sensor Blocked by Ice or Mud.
Persistent noise disturbance in the ultrasonic range

Switch Mechanically blocked since cfg. APA_SwitchBlockedSwitchDuration
ECU not configured or not properly configured
ECU not configured or not properly configured

Label.Text: To be used only by a person who knows the systems !!!
